text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 
32 
MC_PLAN_NAME 
LABEL: 
Managed Care Plan Name 
DESCRIPTION: The name of the managed care entity under contract with the State Medicaid Agency. The name is as 
it appears on the contract, most recent in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_NAME 
LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_NAME 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
82 
FILE(S): 
APL base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 
VALUES: 
The managed care
